title: Cobblemon: Kittycats
description: A Cobblemon addon that gives Meowth and Persian calico variants
body:
# Cobblemon: Kittycats **A Cobblemon addon with the goal to add variants of cat Pokemon with different cat fur patterns.** ** ** So far only Meowth and Persian but over time I want to add more variants for Kantonian Meowth as well as Galarian and Alolan, and other cat Pokemon like Litten and Espurr ## Meowth and Persian! (Calico Variants) Can spawn randomly in place of regular Kantonian Meowth
# Litten, Torracat, and Incineroar (Burnt Point Variants) Can spawn randomly in place of their respective regular tabby versions ![The entre litten evolution line standing together, staring down the player as cats do. At he edge of the screen is part of a shiny burnt point litten.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fnrBOi0P/images/359ea706e791b230845f8f9552ebef5bff742802.png)
